data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of local policy controls without enforcing hardcoded global rules. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific details or records that demonstrate the implementation of such local policy controls. The linked use case emphasizes the need for this requirement, but the absence of relevant evidence indicates a clear gap in satisfying the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of local policy controls being implemented without hardcoded global rules.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
